channel.title: Rom on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Rom on Tech Tracker

item.title: PixelExperience - A custom ROM based on AOSP with all Pixel goodies for Android !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-J2o7a7p7seY/X-3WftUO1dI/AAAAAAAACeE/nvbAS8pJjC819emL2p7TCfBUq-i1KDDDgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1609422453832700-0.png" alt=""> Pixelexperience is a custom ROM based on AOSP - Android open source project by XDA recognized developer José Henrique Silva ( jhenrique09 ) from Maceió - AL in Brazil. <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-7J4IDYa1tHg/X-3INJvQSVI/AAAAAAAACdg/LnCYrcEx_lMQ7COg3FsfPnYTIEj7_Z9BACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1609418800140174-1.png" alt=""> - XDA - here - GitHub - here - PayPal Donation URL - here - Paypal Email - jhsv09@gmail.com - Twitter - here • Devices - here • Status - here • Statistics - here - Gerrit code review - here - CI Dashboard - here - Help on translation - here Google’s pixel phones comes with stock AOSP ROM but with added features made exclusively for pixel devices by google developers.

item.title: Moto E 2015 got 11.0 Custom ROM for Android !
item.description: Motorola launched many amazing budget phones Moto E 2015 is one of them, it was launched long back but it’s still alive due to it’s third party deve - loper support. Moto E 2015 released in 2015 with budget specs at that time it comes in 5.0 lollipop and official software updates stopped at 6.0.1 marshmallow. However, due to its immense third party developer support from XDA it’s still got latest android OS every time.
